column3: Some clothes have to be suitable for special working conditional.
It's nice to enjoy a few designer labels if you've got the cash.
Sometimes you have to dress well to be successful in life.
Many people find it hard to dress comfortably for work and look good.
If you want clothes to last, you have to take care of them.
Clothing is an expression of who you are.
The best clothes are the ones we pay little for.
